text: Everything here is bathed in a mysterious, artificial glow. The neon light through the glass feels cold and distant, and the empty chairs are evocative of absence. I sense both curiosity and alienation. The second view, with its wall of "R+D" and monitors, speaks of innovation—yet there is quietness, as if the ideas have not yet found their voices. I feel like an observer on the threshold of something new, unsure whether to enter or remain on the outside.
